title: Unable to vendor in buildah using "dep ensure"
body:
**Unable to vendor in buildah using "dep ensure"**

I am trying to use buildah in a Go dep [project](https://github.com/aravindhp/buildah-example/) but am running into issues vendoring it in. I see the following error when I run `dep ensure -v`:
```
Solving failure: No versions of github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient met constraints:
        1.2.0: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@1.2.0, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        1.1.0: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@1.1.0, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        1.1: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@1.1, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        1.0: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@1.0, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        1.0.0: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@1.0.0, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        openshift-3.9: package github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient/internal/archive does not exist within project github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)
        master: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@master, as itis not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        openshift-4.0: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@openshift-4.0, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
        docker-1.9/go-1.4: Could not introduce github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient (from https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git)@docker-1.9/go-1.4, as it is not allowed by constraint openshift-3.9 from project github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.
```
I am seeing this with dep v0.5.0.
```
(master ✓) buildah-example dep version
dep:
 version     : v0.5.0
 build date  : 2018-07-26
 git hash    : 224a564
 go version  : go1.10.3
 go compiler : gc
 platform    : linux/amd64
 features    : ImportDuringSolve=false
```
Full output of `dep ensure -v` can be found [here](http://pasted.co/e75f5967).

cc @nalind 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `git clone https://github.com/aravindhp/buildah-example.git`
2. `cd aravindhp/buildah-example.git`
3. `dep ensure -v`

**Describe the results you received:**
Shown in the description

**Describe the results you expected:**
Expect buildah to be present in the vendor folder

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
Fedora release 29 (Twenty Nine)
NAME=Fedora
VERSION="29 (Workstation Edition)"
ID=fedora
VERSION_ID=29
VERSION_CODENAME=""
PLATFORM_ID="platform:f29"
PRETTY_NAME="Fedora 29 (Workstation Edition)"
ANSI_COLOR="0;34"
LOGO=fedora-logo-icon
CPE_NAME="cpe:/o:fedoraproject:fedora:29"
HOME_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/"
DOCUMENTATION_URL="https://docs.fedoraproject.org/en-US/fedora/f29/system-administrators-guide/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Communicating_and_getting_help"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugzilla.redhat.com/"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT_VERSION=29
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT_VERSION=29
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Legal:PrivacyPolicy"
VARIANT="Workstation Edition"
VARIANT_ID=workstation
Fedora release 29 (Twenty Nine)
Fedora release 29 (Twenty Nine)
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux aravindh 4.20.5-200.fc29.x86_64 #1 SMP Mon Jan 28 19:29:17 UTC 2019 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

comments.body:
Does adding this snippet to your top-level `Gopkg.toml` help?
```
[[override]]
  name = "github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient"
  source = "https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git"
```

Scratch that.  Try using
```
[[override]]
  name = "github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient"
  source = "https://github.com/openshift/go-dockerclient.git"
  branch = "openshift-4.0"

[[override]]
  name = "github.com/docker/docker"
  source = "github.com/nalind/docker"
  revision = "b68221c37e+SIGUNUSED"
```
and building with the `containers_image_docker_daemon_stub` tag.  The latter override should change if/when https://github.com/openshift/moby-moby/pull/1 is merged.
With those overrides `dep ensure -v` went through. I will try adding the tag to my build shortly and ensure that it builds too.
Seems to have fixed his issue.
